desc.home: The future of decentralized communication. Secure, resilient, and unstoppable messaging over Reticulum.
desc.download: Download MeshChatX for Windows, Linux, macOS, Docker, and Python. Decentralized messaging over Reticulum.
desc.contact: Contact the MeshChatX developer via LXMF (Reticulum messaging).
desc.donate: Support MeshChatX on Ko-fi, Buy Me a Coffee, or with Monero (XMR).
desc.privacy: How meshchatx.com handles data, including privacy-friendly analytics with GoatCounter.

footer.tagline: Secure, resilient, and unstoppable communication over the Reticulum network.
footer.meta_site: MeshChatX is a quad4.io project.

privacy.p_scope: This policy describes how the public marketing website at meshchatx.com (the "Site") processes information when you visit pages on the Site. It does not govern the MeshChatX application, Reticulum, or third-party services you may use separately.
privacy.p_analytics: We use GoatCounter, a privacy-oriented web analytics tool, on a self-hosted instance at goat.meshchatx.com. It helps us understand aggregate traffic (for example which pages are viewed and approximate geographic region derived from IP) so we can improve the Site.
privacy.p_analytics_detail: GoatCounter is designed to be GDPR-friendly: it does not use tracking cookies for analytics, does not build cross-site advertising profiles, and collects only what is needed for basic statistics. For more on how GoatCounter approaches privacy and GDPR, see the official GoatCounter documentation. You may use standard browser controls (including extensions that block scripts) if you prefer not to load the analytics script.
privacy.p_rights: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of personal data, and to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. The analytics data GoatCounter collects is limited; if you have a specific request regarding data from this Site, contact us as below and we will respond as required by applicable law.
privacy.p_contact: For privacy questions about this Site, see the contact page.

hero.lead: MeshChatX is a all-in-one Reticulum client featuring messaging, calling, and a nomadnet browser.

section.infra_lead: Built for mesh networks and censorship resistance.

feature.decentralized_p: Built on Reticulum. No central servers, no single point of failure. Total ownership of your data.
feature.crypto_p: Reticulum uses efficient, strong, and well-tested cryptographic primitives designed for safety and reliability across all platforms.
feature.mesh_p: Communicate across any medium. MeshChatX works over the internet, radio, LoRa, and many other mediums!
feature.platform_p: Officially supported on Desktop (Electron) and Web (Docker/Python). Android is available via Termux.

split.item1_p: Create and manage as many identities as you need. Switch between personas seamlessly while keeping your data private and compartmentalized.
split.item2_p: No government ID, phone number, or email required. Access the network anonymously without any third-party verification or hurdles.
split.item3_p: Built for mesh networks and censorship resistance. Your messages propagate automatically and local archiving ensures your data is always available.
